claim_text: Patient reports experiencing low back pain for two weeks after lifting a box of books.
Pain is described as "achy and sharp" and is now radiating down the left leg.
Patient denies bladder or bowel dysfunction.
Patient denies history of heart disease.
Patient denies any other significant medical conditions.
Lungs are clear to auscultation bilaterally.
Midline tenderness is present at L4-L5.
Right sided lumbar paravertebral tenderness is present.
Pain is present with lumbar flexion.
Right-sided lumbar paravertebral tenderness is present on palpation.
Right-sided L4-L5 tenderness is present on palpation.
Paracentral disk herniation is resulting in moderate right neuroforaminal stenosis.
Patient has lumbar back pain with radiculopathy.
Patient has moderate right neuroforaminal stenosis.
Patient has disk bulge with pericantral disk herniation with radiculopathy.
Patient is to receive a spinal injection with a strong NSAID and corticosteroid under fluoroscopy.
Patient is to be contacted for scheduling.
